zh.Widworthy, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文維德沃希
zh.Banbury, Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾班波瑞

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Byset Wotton於1262年出生在英國英格蘭戴文維德沃希時，他的父親John de Wotton I38歲，母親Ela Bisset36歲。他於大約1300年與Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1315年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.Widworthy, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文維德沃希

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Byset Wotton于1262年出生在英国英格兰戴文維德沃希时，他的父亲John de Wotton I38岁，母亲Ela Bisset36岁。他于大约1300年与Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1315年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wotton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wooten
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called with Old English wid(u), wudu ‘wood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Wootton in Northamptonshire or Oxfordshire, Wootton Bassett in Wiltshire, Wotton in Surrey, and Wotton under Edge in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Byset Wotton was born in 1262, in Widworthy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Wotton I, was 38 and his mother, Ela Bisset, was 36. He married Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark about 1300, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1315, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Byset Wotton est né en 1262, à Widworthy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Wotton I, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ela Bisset, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark environ 1300, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1315, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Byset Wotton 1262 in Widworthy, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Wotton I 38 und seine Mutter Ela Bisset 36. Er hat um 1300 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Byset Wotton è nato il nel 1262 nel Widworthy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Wotton I, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Ela Bisset, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark circa 1300, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1315, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Byset Wottonが1262年にイギリスイギリスデボンウィドウオルシーで生まれた時，父John de Wotton Iは38歳，母Ela Bissetは36歳であった。約1300年にイギリスイギリスデボンでEngaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1315年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Byset Wotton(이)가 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 위드워시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Wotton I(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela Bisset(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1315년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Byset Wotton nasceu em 1262, em Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Wotton I, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ela Bisset, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark aproximadamente 1300, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1315, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Byset Wotton родился в 1262 г. в местности видворти, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Wotton I было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Bisset, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark около 1300 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1315 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Byset Wotton nació en 1262, en Widworthy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Wotton I, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ela Bisset, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Engaret Lady Baroness Wotton Dymark aproximadamente 1300, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1315, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
